stemHtml:
Calculate the net glide distance for a single-engined aeroplane following an engine failure.

Aeroplane altitude: 8000 ft
Terrain elevation: 1500 ft
Gross gradient: 8%
TAS: 200 kt
Headwind component: 20 kt
1 NM = 6080 ft

Still air distance = (height difference / net gradients) x 100
Ground distance = still air distance x (GS/TAS)
Calculation accuracy = one decimal place
